name: The Scope of Chemistry and Biochemistry
General Chemistry I
raw_prereq: CHEM 4, or AP Chemistry score of 3, or Math Placement Exam qualifying score, or AP Calculus AB score of 2, or MATH 3C or higher.

name: Honors General Chemistry I
raw_prereq: AP Chemistry score of 4, or Math Placement Exam qualifying score, or AP Calculus AB score of 3, or MATH 4C or MATH 10A. Recommended: completion of a high school physics course strongly recommended. Concurrent enrollment in MATH 20A or higher.

name: Honors General Chemistry II
raw_prereq: CHEM 6AH and MATH 20A. Recommended: concurrent or prior enrollment in MATH 20B.

name: General Chemistry Laboratory for Majors
raw_prereq: CHEM 6B or 6BH. Restricted to the following major codes: CH25, CH34, CH35, CH36, CH38.

name: Molecules and Reactions
raw_prereq: CHEM 11 or good knowledge of high school chemistry.

name: Organic Chemistry for Life Sciences I
Organic Chemistry for Life Sciences II
Organic Chemistry III
raw_prereq: CHEM 40B or 140B (a grade of C or higher in CHEM 40B or 140B is strongly recommended).

name: Organic Chemistry I: Structure and Reactivity
Organic Chemistry II: Reactivity and Synthesis
Organic Chemistry III: Synthesis, Reactivity, and Macromolecules
First-year Student Seminar in Chemistry and Biochemistry
Independent Study
raw_prereq: lower-division standing, 3.0 minimum UC San Diego GPA, consent of instructor and department, completion of thirty units of undergraduate study at UC San Diego, completed and approved Special Studies form.

name: Independent Study
raw_prereq: student must be of first-year standing and a Regent’s Scholar; approved Special Studies form.

name: Analytical Chemistry Laboratory
raw_prereq: CHEM 6C or 6CH and CHEM 7L or 7LM. Recommended: PHYS 2CL or 2BL.

name: Instrumental Chemistry Laboratory
raw_prereq: CHEM 100A and PHYS 2C or 2D and PHYS 2BL or 2CL or 2DL.

name: Physical Chemistry Laboratory
raw_prereq: CHEM 6CL or 100A, PHYS 2BL or 2CL or 2DL, and CHEM 126 or 126A or 126B or 127 or 130 or 131 or 133.

name: Origins of Life and the Universe
Chemical Biology
raw_prereq: CHEM 41C or CHEM 40B, and CHEM 114A. (May not be offered every year.)

name: RNA Biochemistry
raw_prereq: BIMM 100 or CHEM 114C and CHEM 40C, 40CH, or 41C.

name: Advanced Inorganic Chemistry Laboratory
raw_prereq: CHEM 120A, 120B and 43A, 143A, 43AM or 143AH. Restricted to the following major codes: CH25, CH31, CH34, CH35, CH36, CH37.

name: Physical Biochemistry I: Thermodynamics and Kinetics of Biomolecules
raw_prereq: CHEM 6C or 6CH, PHYS 1C or 2C or 2D, and MATH 10C or 20C.

name: Physical Biochemistry II: Quantum and Statistical Mechanics of Biomolecules
Chemical Physics: Quantum Mechanics
raw_prereq: CHEM 6C or 6CH, and PHYS 2C or 2D, and MATH 20D.

name: Chemical Physics: Stat Thermo I
raw_prereq: CHEM 6C or 6CH, MATH 20C, and PHYS 2C or 2D.

name: Molecular Spectroscopy
raw_prereq: CHEM 126 or 126B or 130 or 133 and MATH 20D.

name: Introduction to Glycosciences
raw_prereq: CHEM 40B, 40BH, 41B, 140B, or 140BH and BIBC 100 or BILD 1 or CHEM 114A.

name: Kinetics and Mechanism of Organic Reactions
Mechanisms of Organic Reactions
raw_prereq: CHEM 40B or 41C. Recommended: CHEM 152 is strongly recommended.

name: Structure and Properties of Organic Molecules
raw_prereq: CHEM 40B or 41C and CHEM 120A. Recommended: CHEM 154 is strongly recommended.

name: Structural Biology of Viruses
raw_prereq: BIBC 100 or CHEM 114A and BIBC 102 or CHEM 114B and BIMM 100 or CHEM 114C.

name: 3-D Cryo-Electron Microscopy of Macromolecules and Cells
Applied Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning for Chemistry and Biochemistry
raw_prereq: CHEM 114A. Recommended: Introductory course in Python programming, with a focus on the pandas library.

name: Quantum Chemistry Lab
raw_prereq: CHEM 126 or 126B or 130 or 133 and MATH 20C or 31BH. (May not be offered every year.)

name: Molecular Simulations Lab
raw_prereq: MATH 20C and CHEM 126 or CHEM 126B or CHEM 130 or CHEM 133.

name: Foundations of Teaching and Learning Science
raw_prereq: CHEM 6C or 6CH and CHEM 96 or EDS 31.

name: Capstone Seminar in Science Education
raw_prereq: CHEM 6C or 6CH and CHEM 187 or EDS 122.

name: Senior Seminar in Chemistry and Biochemistry
raw_prereq: department stamp and/or consent of the instructor.

name: Reading and Research in Chemical Education
raw_prereq: upper-division standing, 2.5 minimum GPA, consent of instructor and department.

name: Chemistry Internship
raw_prereq: completion of ninety units with a minimum GPA of 2.5, and an approved Special Studies online application, and AIP learning agreement.

name: Directed Group Study
raw_prereq: department approval required and an approved Special Studies online application.

name: Reading and Research
raw_prereq: upper-division standing, minimum GPA of 2.5, consent of instructor and department, and an approved Special Studies online application.

name: Macromolecular Recognition
raw_prereq: biochemistry background and graduate standing, or approval of instructor.

raw_prereq: graduate standing or consent of instructor.

raw_prereq: graduate standing or consent of instructor.

Applied Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning for Chemistry and Biochemistry

raw_prereq: graduate standing and department approval required. This course is only open for students supported or affiliated with the Molecular Biophysics Training Program.

raw_prereq: graduate standing and department approval required. This course is only open for students supported or affiliated with the Chemistry-Biology Interfaces Training Program.
